description: This is an envelope neck bodysuit specially designed so that it does not pull your baby’s ears off. It has popper fasteners at the bottom for easy dressing. This is a quality UK made garment made from 100% Cotton and machine washable at 40 degrees. Available in sizes newborn, 0-3, 3-6, 6-9 and 9-12 months.
